query:
SELECT s.id, s.conversionId, s.pageNum, LENGTH(s.htmlContent) as htmlLen,
       SUBSTRING(s.htmlContent, 1, 500) as htmlSnippet
FROM slides s
JOIN conversions c ON s.conversionId = c.id
WHERE c.status = 'done'
ORDER BY htmlLen ASC
LIMIT 5;
command:

SELECT s.id, s.conversionId, s.pageNum, LENGTH(s.htmlContent) as htmlLen,
       SUBSTRING(s.htmlContent, 1, 500) as htmlSnippet
FROM slides s
JOIN conversions c ON s.conversionId = c.id
WHERE c.status = 'done'
ORDER BY htmlLen ASC
LIMIT 5;
